name: @caia/memory-consolidator
description: Layer 4 of the AI-first continuous discipline framework. Daily cron that scans memory files (corpusRoot), validates cross-references ([[wiki-links]] + [text](file.md)), detects stale superseded_by: chains and missing MEMORY.md index entries, then surfaces findings to INBOX.md and writes a daily consolidation report. Parameterised (corpusRoot/inboxPath/reportsRoot/researchRoot/clock/fs) per Option-E shape; fixture-corpus tests inject fake trees; production injects CAIA defaults. Subscription-only — no API keys, no LLM calls in v0 (deferred to a follow-up once Layer 3 architecture-registry wiring lands). launchd plist com.caia.memory-consolidator-daily runs 03:00 local. Exit 0 even when findings surface; failure surface is INBOX + report, not exit code.
